Patch Set 3:

(2 comments)

Looks mostly good, but I think the comments in wiretest.c should not be removed. I know you inserted similar comments in wirecheck.c, but it cannot do harm to have them everywhere. Especially because people often edit wiretest.c directly instead of generating from wirecheck.c (as it is most of the time simple copy/paste).

Patch Set 3:

> Especially because people often edit wiretest.c directly instead of generating from wirecheck.c (as it is most of the time simple copy/paste).

Why do you need to manually edit an automatically generated file ? I think it is a bad habit leading to exact this situation required this "synchronise" patch.

Patch Set 3:

(1 comment)

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> (2 comments)
> 
> Looks mostly good, but I think the comments in wiretest.c should not be removed. I know you inserted similar comments in wirecheck.c, but it cannot do harm to have them everywhere. Especially because people often edit wiretest.c directly instead of generating from wirecheck.c (as it is most of the time simple copy/paste).
Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

(3 comments)

I hate to go backward on my review, but Sebastien raises some good points.  I think these differences would be easily fixed.

Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

I've pushed a follow-up patch to add comments for bitfields.
Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1
Patch Set 3: Code-Review+2

parents.subject: LU-16664 build: Debian server fails building crypto.c

commit.subject: LU-16677 utils: synchronize wirecheck.c and wiretest.c
commit.message:
LU-16677 utils: synchronize wirecheck.c and wiretest.c

wirecheck.c is not compilable and out of sync with
wiretest.c.
The patch adds forgotten changes to wirecheck.c and
replaces wiretest.c by a version generated by
"make newwiretest".

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Alexander Zarochentsev <alexander.zarochentsev@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I22cc75b02e163ce3ca743be608ec334c85129b4c
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/50456
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andrew Perepechko <andrew.perepechko@hpe.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
